The y position of the point.
The bulge factor of the arc following the point.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Adds a point to the polygon given real numbers.
member.param: The x position of the point.
The y position of the point.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Adds a copy of a point to the polygon.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Object)

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds all points of a given polygon to this one.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Last
member.summary: Gets a reference to the last point in the poly.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.First
member.summary: Gets a reference to the first point in the poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Pop
member.summary: Removes the last point in the poly. If the poly is empty, an exception will be thrown.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a poly node from a point and a bulge factor.

The bulge factor of the point to add.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(IGS.Genamo.PolyPoint2d)
member.summary: Adds a copy of a PolyPoint2d to the poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Adds a copy of the polys last point translated with a given vector last to the poly. If the poly is empty a point at 0,0 is added first.
member.param: The vector describing the next point to add.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(IGS.Genamo.Arc2d)
member.summary: Adds an arc segment last to the poly. If the arcs startpoint is further away than epsilon from the current endpoint of the poly a line segment is added between.
member.param: The arc containing data for the segment to add.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Add(IGS.Genamo.Line2d)
member.summary: Adds a line segment last to the poly. If the lines startpoint is further away than epsilon from the current endpoint of the poly a line segment is added between.
member.param: The line containing data for the segment to add.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ArcFit(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns a new poly, which is created by fitting arcs to this poly within a given tolerance. This can reduce the number of segments needed to describe this geometry.
member.param: The tolerance to use. The new polys geometry is newer further away from this poly than this tolerance.
member.returns: A new poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.LineFit(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a new optimized poly with only lines.
member.returns: A new poly with only lines.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.AddRaw(IGS.Genamo.PolyPoint2d)
member.summary: Adds a point directly to the polygon without copying it. Use with care if speed is needed.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.EdgeCount
member.summary: Gets the number of edges/segments in this poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Arc(System.Int32)
member.summary: Extracts one segment of this poly as an Arc2d. If the poly contains less than two nodes, an exception is thrown.
member.param: The index of the segment to extract.
member.returns: A new arc which equals the specified poly segment.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.FirstEdge
member.summary: Returns a new arc representing the first edge in the poly

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.LastEdge
member.summary: Returns a new arc representing the last edge in the poly

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.SignedAreaOLD
member.summary: Gets the signed area for polygon. A counter clockwise polygon has posetive area, a clockwise has negative.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.SignedArea
member.summary: Gets the signed area for polygon. A counter clockwise polygon has posetive area, a clockwise has negative.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Area
member.summary: Gets the area of this polygon. If the polygon is open, it imagines a line segment from start to end point.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Direction
member.summary: Gets or sets the direction of this polygon. Clockwise or counter clockwise. See Direction enumeration for details.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Length
member.summary: Gets the length of the polygon, that is the sum of lengths of each segment it contains.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.NodeCount
member.summary: Gets the number of nodes in the polygon.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Start
member.summary: Gets a reference to the first point in the polygon or sets it to a copy of a specified PolyPoint2d. If the poly is empty, an exception will be thrown.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.End
member.summary: Gets a reference to the last point in the polygon or sets it to a copy of a specified PolyPoint2d. If the poly is empty, an exception will be thrown.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Closed
member.summary: Gets or sets the closed state of the poly. A closed poly has one more segment than an open...

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Points
member.summary: Returns a reference to the list of PolyPoint2d:s held by the poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Rotate(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Rotates the poly in-place with a given angle around a specified point.
member.param: The angle in radians to rotate.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Translate(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Translates the poly in-place by a given delta x and delta y.
member.param: Delta x to move the poly.
Delta y to move the poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Transform(IGS.Genamo.Matrix2d)
member.summary: Transforms the poly in-place with a matrix.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Open
member.summary: Same as !Closed

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Contains(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Checks if a point is inside the poly. If the poly is open, an exception is thrown. The direction (CW/CCW) of the poly is not taken into account.
member.param: The point to check for inclusion.
member.returns: true if the point is inside, otherwise false.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.WriteAutoCADScript(System.IO.StreamWriter,System.Int32)
member.summary: Appends text that can be loaded in AutoCAD as a script to a stream.
member.param: The stream to appen text lines to.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Extents
member.summary: Gets the polys bounding box.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Mirror(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Reflects the poly in-place over a line given with two points. Note that the polys direction inverts when reflecting it.
member.param: The first point of the line
The second point of the line

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Scale(System.Double)
member.summary: Scales the poly in-place with a given factor. Factors larger then 1 gives a larger geometry and smaller than 1 gives a smaller.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Scale(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Scales the poly in-place with a given factor using a specified scaling center. Factors larger then 1 gives a larger geometry and smaller than 1 gives a smaller.
member.param: the point used as scale origo.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Rotate(System.Double)
member.summary: Rotates the poly in-place with a specified angle in radians.
member.param: The angle to rotate the poly with.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Offset(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.OffsetGapType,System.Double)
member.summary: Computes a new poly which is an offset of this poly. The offsetted segments can be joined with an arc or by extension. This function automatically removes trivial (zero length) segments in the result poly. The resulting poly will _not_ be trimmed and may contain loops. Use Union() or Trim() to remove such loops if needed.
member.param: The distance to offset the poly. Posetive value offsetts to the right and nagative to the left.
The type of joins made between offsetted segments of poly. See OffsetGapType enumeration for details.
Only used if gaptype is Extend. This is the maximum distance two segments might be extended, otherwise a chamfer is created. If gaptype is not Extend, this parameter is not used.
member.returns: A new, offsetted poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Offset(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.OffsetGapType,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Computes a new poly which is an offset of this poly. The offsetted segments can be joined with an arc or by extension. This function automatically removes trivial (zero length) segments in the result poly. The resulting poly will _not_ be trimmed and may contain loops. Use Union() or Trim() to remove such loops if needed.
member.param: The distance to offset the poly. Posetive value offsetts to the right and nagative to the left.
The type of joins made between offsetted segments of poly. See OffsetGapType enumeration for details.
Only used if gaptype is Extend. This is the maximum distance two segments might be extended, otherwise a chamfer is created. If gaptype is not Extend, this parameter is not used.
True if inner corners should be trimmed
member.returns: A new, offsetted poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.CalcOffsetExtendPointSimple(IGS.Genamo.Arc2d,IGS.Genamo.Arc2d,System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Calculates the extension intersection point of two arcs if the distance is shorter than maxdist.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.CalcOffsetExtendPoint(IGS.Genamo.Arc2d,IGS.Genamo.Arc2d,IGS.Genamo.Point2d@,IGS.Genamo.Point2d@,System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Boolean,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the extension points of a1 and a2 using maxdist for chamfer.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Offset(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Offsets the poly with different distances for every segment. The gap is connected with an interpolated arc.
member.param: List of offset distances, one for each vertex in the poly
member.returns: AN untrimmed offset polygon

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Reverse
member.summary: Reverses the polygon in-place. Note that all bulge factors will be inverted.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Clean
member.summary: Perform a default clean using Calc.Epsilon.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Clean(System.Double)
member.summary: Removes all edges in the poly whose length is less than the given tolerance. This function modifies the poly in-place.
member.param: The accuracy, which is the length of smallest allowed segment.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.MergeArcs(System.Double)
member.summary: Merges concecutive arcs within accuracy.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Clear
member.summary: Removes all nodes from the poly and makes it open, just like a new default poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Distance(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Computes the minimum distance from a point to the poly.
member.returns: The minimum distance from the poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ClosestNode(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Double@)
member.summary: Computes the index of the closest node in the poly from a given point. If the poly is empty, an exception will be thrown.
member.param: The point to be as close as possible to.
Set to the distance to the actual node found.
member.returns: The index of the node closest to the point.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ClosestNode(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Computes the index of the closest node in the poly from a given point. If the poly is empty, an exception will be thrown.
member.param: The point to be as close as possible to.
member.returns: The index of the node closest to the point.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ClosestOuterCorner(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the closest outer corner index from point pt
member.returns: -1 if no outer corner found otherwise the index to the corner

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ClosestSegment(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Double@)
member.summary: Computes the index of the closest segment in the poly from a given point. If the poly has less than two nodes (=0 segments), an exception will be thrown.
member.param: The point to be as close as possible to.
Set to the distance to the actual segment found.
member.returns: The index of the segment closest to the point.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ClosestSegment(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Computes the index of the closest segment in the poly from a given point. If the poly has less than two nodes (=0 segments), an exception will be thrown.
member.param: The point to be as close as possible to.
member.returns: The index of the segment closest to the point.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ClosestPoint(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Computes a new point on the poly that is as close as possible to a given point. If the poly is empty, an exception will be thrown.
member.param: the point to be as close as possible to.
member.returns: A new point on the poly.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Centroid
member.summary: Gets a new point, which represents the centroid of the polygon, as if the polygon was a solid plate. If the polygon is empty, an exception will be thrown.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.WireCentroid
member.summary: Gets the center of gravity for this poly as if it is a wire.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.IsShorterThan(System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if the length of this poly is shorter than a given length. This is faster than checning if the length property is shorter than a value, because it can break when the limit has been reached.
member.param: The length to check if the poly is shorter than.
member.returns: true if the poly is shorter than the given value.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.IsLongerThan(System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if the length of this poly is longer than a given length. This is faster than checking if the length property is longer than a value, because it can break when the limit has been reached.
member.param: The length to check if the poly is longer than.
member.returns: true if the poly is longer than the given value.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Eval(System.Double,System.Double@)
member.summary: Evaluates a point on the polygon given a parameter in the range 0-1 between the polygons endpoints. If the poly is closed, larger or smaller valus than this range wraps around the poly. If the poly is open, the point is on the extension of the start/end point. A tangent at the point found is computed as well.
member.param: The parameter to compute for. Range 0-1.
Set to the tangent angel at the point computed.
member.returns: A new point at the given parameter.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Eval(System.Double)
member.summary: Evaluates a point on the polygon given a parameter in the range 0-1 between the polygons endpoints. If the poly is closed, larger or smaller valus than this range wraps around the poly. If the poly is open, the point is on the extension of the start/end point.
member.param: The parameter to compute for. Range 0-1.
member.returns: A new point at the given parameter.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Flatten(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.FlattenMode)
member.summary: Computes a new polygon, containing only line segments. Arc segments are flattened using the given tolerance.
member.param: The tolerance to flatten arc segments with.
The mode to use when flattening. See FlattenMode for details.
member.returns: A new polygon with only line segments.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Measure(System.Double)
member.summary: Divides a poly into pieces with length dist The last piece might be shorter
member.returns: A list of polys

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.MeasureEdges(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a point list along the poly with distance dist. Works per edge so the actual distance can vary between edges.
member.returns: A list of points

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Union
member.summary: Computes a self-union of this poly. This will for example remove loops created by an offset of a closed polygon. Note that clockwise polygons are seen as holes and will produce no results if union:ed.
member.returns: A new region with the resulting contours of this operation.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Stroke(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.LineCapMode,IGS.Genamo.OffsetGapType,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns a new poly that is a two-way offset of this poly, which for example is suitable when this poly is to be rasterized as a fat line. Line joins and end caps can be choosen. If the poly is closed, an exception will be thrown. The result is _not_ trimmed. See Union() function for this.
member.param: The offset distance of the line. The total thickness of the resulting polygon is this value time two.
Describes how the endcaps is created. See LineCapMode enumeration for details.
Describes how the segments are joined. See OffsetGapType enumeration for details.
The maximium distance to use if gaptype is Extend, otherwise this parameter is not used.
member.returns: A new poly which is a closed, 'fattened' version of this poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Swell(System.Double)
member.summary: Shortcut to Stroke(...) the poly with Round linecaps and round endcaps, that is the 'real' offset of the line (all points of the result has the given distance to the original line). The result is _not_ trimmed. See Union() function for this. If the poly is closed, an exception will be thrown.
member.param: The distance from the result to this poly.
member.returns: A new, untrimmed and swelled version of this poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.IsConvex
member.summary: Checks if this polygon is convex.
member.returns: true if this polygon is convex, otherwise false.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Param(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Computes a parameter on the poly in the range 0-1 where a given point resides. If the point is further away than 1e-4 from the poly, an exception is thrown. If the point is at a self intersection of the poly, the first(lowest) parameter is computed.
member.param: The point to get parameter for.
member.returns: A parameter in the range 0-1.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ToString
member.summary: Returns a new string that contains debug information for the poly.
member.returns: A string with some poly data.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.GetNodeListString
member.summary: Helper function to ToString()

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ToRegion(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a region representing the poly exactly.
member.param: Not used in this case. (Exists due to inheritance).
member.returns: A new region that represents the the poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ToPoints
member.summary: Returns the polys points as a list of Point2d
member.returns: A list of Point2d of the polys points

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.OffsetUnion(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.OffsetGapType,System.Double)
member.summary: Offsets a closed poly and trims it using a self union. See Offset(...) and Union(...) function for more details. If the poly is open the result is undefined or an exception is thrown.
member.param: The distance to offset the poly. Posetive value offsetts to the right and nagative to the left.
The type of joins made between offsetted segments of poly. See OffsetGapType enumeration for details.
Only used if gaptype is Extend. This is the maximum distance two segments might be extended, otherwise a chamfer is created. If gaptype is not Extend, this parameter is not used.
member.returns: A new region containing the resulting polygons.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.SubPoly(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Splits a poly at startparam and creates an open poly of paramlength If paramlength is negative direction is reversed Handles any parameters not just in 0-1

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Split(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Double},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Splits the polygon into sub-polygons at a list of parameters in the range 0-1. The parameter list does _not_ need to be sorted. Any points outside the polygon are ignored. If the number of points on the polygon is N, the number of polys returned is exactly N+1.
member.param: A list of unsorted parameters in the range 0-1.
If true and poly is closed, merge first and last poly.
member.returns: A list of new polys that are sub-polygons of this poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Split(System.Double[])
member.summary: Splits the polygon into sub-polygons at a list of parameters in the range 0-1. The parameter list does _not_ need to be sorted.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Split(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{IGS.Genamo.Point2d})
member.summary: Tries to split a polygon into a list of subpolygons using the given points. If a point does not lie on the polygon, it is ignored.
member.returns: A list of split polys

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.FindSplitParams(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{IGS.Genamo.Point2d})
member.summary: Converts a list of points to parameters
member.returns: A list of parameters

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.ComputeKDTree(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{IGS.Genamo.Point2d})
member.summary: Helper function to FindSplitParams. Creates a KD tree of the points
member.returns: A KD tree

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Split(IGS.Genamo.Point2d[])
member.summary: Tries to split a polygon into a list of subpolygons using the given points. If a point does not lie on the polygon, it is ignored.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Split(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Poly2d@,IGS.Genamo.Poly2d@)
member.summary: Splits this poly at a given parameter. If this poly is closed, a single result with a poly open at that point is computed, otherwise two result polygons is computed.
member.param: The parameter to split at in the range 0-1.
The sub-polygon from parameter 0.0 to the given parmeter.
The sub polygon from the given parameter to parameter 1.0 or null if a closed polygon was splitted.
member.returns: The number of polygons computed (1 or 2).

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.GetY(System.Double)
member.summary: Get Y for a certain X, works only on X-monotone polys

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.GetX(System.Double)
member.summary: Get X for a certain Y, works only on Y-monotone polys

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.InsertNode(System.Double)
member.summary: Inserts a node at pos and returns the index to the inserted node If the node already exists the index is just returned
member.param: The parametric position where a node is inserted in the range [0,1]
member.returns: -1 if the function fails otherwise the index to the new node

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.OffsetRound(System.Double)
member.summary: Untrimmed offset with Arc gaptype
member.returns: An offset poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Clip(IGS.Genamo.Extents2d,IGS.Genamo.Poly2d@)
member.summary: Clips the Poly2d to a specified clipping box. The result is a new Poly2d defining the part that is completely inside the clip box. The Poly2d must be closed and consist of only lines.
member.returns: true if any portion of the Poly2d is inside the clipbox.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.TryClose(System.Double)
member.summary: Tries to close the poly. Removes last point and sets closed=true.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Midpoint
member.summary: The point splitting the poly in two polys of equal length.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.IsOuterCorner(System.Int32,System.Double,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Detects if a node in a poly is an outside corner. Poly is supposed to be closed and CCW.
member.param: The "turn angle", If angle is larger than this is counted as a corner.
member.returns: true if a corner false otherwise

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.IsCircular(IGS.Genamo.Circle2d@,System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if a poly is a circle
member.returns: True if circle false otherwise

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.IsCircular(System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if a poly is a circle
member.returns: True if circle false otherwise

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.DouglasPeucker(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a DouglasPeucker poly.
member.returns: A DouglasPeucker poly

member.summary: Helper function to DouglasPeucker

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.Shorten(System.Double)
member.summary: Shortens an open poly with dist (must be positive). If not possible a copy of the poly is returned unchanged.
member.returns: A shortened poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.MakeYMonotone
member.summary: Splits all arcs so that they are Y-monotone.
member.returns: A new poly with only Y-monotone edges.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.GetCentralPoint(System.Double@)
member.summary: Calculates an optimal point that is most inside the poly
member.returns: A most inside point

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Poly2d.GetCentralPoint

member.summary: Gets the center of gravity for this poly as if it is a wire.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Poly3d.Plane
member.summary: Computes the plane of the poly. If the points is not all in the same plane, the results are undefined. Handles degenerate polys , but must have at least 3 separated points.

member.summary: Simplifies the polys in a region.
member.param: Min number of edges in result foreach poly
Max amount of area reduction. ex. 0.1 means 10% area difference. If 0 then not used.
True if only reflex vertices (inner corners) should be considered
member.returns: A reduced polygon

member.summary: Simplifies a simple polygon of lines.
member.param: Min number of edges in result
Max amount of area reduction. ex. 0.1 means 10% area difference. If 0 then not used.
True if only reflex vertices should be considered
member.returns: A reduced polygon

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.PolygonSimplification.Simplify(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Simple simplification that can result in a result that overlaps the input poly. The input poly must only contain lines
member.param: The poly to simplify only lines
Number of edges in the simplified poly

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Turn(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Return angle a, adjusted by +-2kPI so that it is within [base-PI, base+PI).

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.poly_to_turn_rep(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d)
member.summary: Convert a polygon to a turning rep. This computes the absolute angle of each leg wrt the x-axis, then adjusts this to within PI of the last leg to form the turning angle. Finally, the total length of all legs is used to compute the cumulative normalized arc length of each discontinuity, s.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.rotate_turn_rep(IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Turnrep,System.Int32)
member.summary: Fill in a turn rep with a rotated version of an original. Normalized arc lengths start at 0 in the new representation.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.init_vals(IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Turnrep,IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Turnrep,System.Double@,System.Double@,System.Double@)
member.summary: In one O(m + n) pass over the turning reps of the polygons to be matched, this computes all the terms needed to incrementally compute the metric. See the paper.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.next_event
member.summary: Remove the event of min t from the heap and return it.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.init_events(IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Turnrep,IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Turnrep)
member.summary: Scan the turning reps to create the initial events in the heap as described above.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.h_t0min(IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Turnrep,IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Turnrep,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double@)
member.summary: The heart of the algorithm: Compute the minimum value of the integral term of the metric by considering all critical events. This also returns the theta* and event associated with the minimum.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.ShapeSimilarity.Calculate(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,IGS.Genamo.Poly2d,System.Double@)
member.summary: Calculates the similarity between two polys. 0=perfect This function is scale independant so the polys can have different size. It only compare the shape of the polys. Rot is how much the first poly pf should be rotated to obtain the match.
member.param: The angle to rotate the first poly in radians for the best match
member.returns: A metric of how similar the polys are 0=perfect match.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Polynomial.Coefficients

member.summary: Gets a transposed version of this matrix.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.RealPolynomial.#ctor(System.Double[])
member.summary: Creates a polynomial with the most significant coefficient first. For example new RealPolynomial(3,4,5) creates the polynomial 3x^2 + 4x + 5. The order of the coefficients is reversed internally

member.summary: Removes zero valued coeficients first in polynomial. Returns true if anything was removed.

member.summary: Returns an array with the real solutions of euqtion ax^2+bx+c=0 This array can be 0,1 or 2 elements long.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.RealPolynomial.SolveQuadric(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double@,System.Double@)
member.summary: Solves the equation ax^2+bx+c. Returns true if it was solvable. If not solvable, x1 and y1 is set to Nan. The results x1 is always less or equal to x2, ie result are sorted.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.RealPolynomial.SolveLinear(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns an array with the solution of the equation ax+b This array can 1 elements long or null is returned.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.RealPolynomial.SolveQuartic(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns an array with the real solutions of eqution ax^4+bx^3+cx^2+dx+e=0 This array can be 1 to 4 elements long. If no solutions found, null is returned.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.RealPolynomial.Normalize(System.Double)
member.summary: Divides all coefficients with the largest coefficients, so that all coefficients becomes between -1 and 1 Returns the divisor of the normalization, or 0.0 if polynomial could not be normalized (all factors=0).

member.summary: Gets the coefficient that has the highest absoulte value.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.RealPolynomial.GetRootBounds(System.Double@,System.Double@)
member.summary: Computes a range, in which all the roots of the polynomial is.

member.param: The poly to add to the region.

member.summary: Gets the length of the region, that is the sum of lengths all contours it contains.

member.summary: Gets the area of the region, considering holes. Assumes the region is simple and the contour directions is correct.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.AreaOuter
member.summary: Sum of all CCW polys area

member.summary: Reverses the direction of every poly in the region

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Reverse
member.summary: Reverses the order of the polys in the region and also reverses each poly.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Contains(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Checks if a point is inside the region. It handles holes, but assumes the region is simple.
member.param: The point to check for inclusion.
member.returns: true if the point is inside the region otherwise false.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Extents

member.summary: Mirrors the region in-place over a reflection line. Note that this will cause all bulge factors to be inverted.
member.param: The first point of reflection line.
The second point of reflection line.

member.summary: Translates the poly in-place a specified distance in x and y.
member.param: The distance to move the region in x.
The distance to move the region in y.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Rotate(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Rotates the region in-place around a point.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Rotate(System.Double)
member.summary: Rotates the region in-place around world origo.
member.param: The angle to rotate in radians.

member.summary: Scales the region in-place using world origo as scaling center.

member.summary: Scales the region using a specified point as scaling center.
member.param: The factor to scale with. Factors larger than 1.0 gives a larger geometry.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Indexed direct access to the polys in the region. Setting a poly will clone this poly before inserting it into the region. Indexing an empty region will throw an exception.
member.param: The index of the poly to get/set. This index is circular and will wrap over both negative and positive, which means index -1 is the last region in the poly.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Polys
member.summary: Gets a reference to the list of poly in this region or sets it to a new array of polys.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.WriteAutoCADScript(System.IO.StreamWriter,System.Int32)
member.summary: Writes the object as an AutoCAD loadable script to a stream using a specified color

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Offset(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.OffsetGapType,System.Double)
member.summary: Offsets each contour in this region. See offset in Poly2d() for details.
member.param: The type of joins between offsetted segments. See OffsetGapType enumeration for details.
If gaptype is 'Extend' this is the maximum length of extension, otherwise its not used.
member.returns: A new region with the offsetted vaersion of this region.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Centroid
member.summary: Gets the center of gravity for this region taking holes into account. The computation is done as the region is a plate.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.SortLevels(System.Collections.Generic.List{IGS.Genamo.Region2d.LevelInfo})
member.summary: Finds level information for non-intersecting polygons

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Normalize
member.summary: Modifies the region in place so that the direction of the polys is winding correct and arranges them in order so that a counter clockwise outer poly is followed by all clockwise polys that are holes in it. Assumes the polys in the region are simple and closed.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.NormalizeSplit
member.summary: Normalizes the region with Normalize() function and splits each separate contour to a separate region that are put in the list returned. Note that this function modifies the region in-place. Assumes the polys in the region are simple and closed. Also note that polys are copied into the new regions!
member.returns: A list of regions with one outer contour and possibly some holes.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.NormalizeSplitRaw
member.summary: Normalizes the region with Normalize() function and splits each separate contour to a separate region that are put in the list returned. Note that this function modifies the region in-place. Assumes the polys in the region are simple and closed. Also note that Polys are added to the new regions using Region2d.AddRaw()!
member.returns: A list of regions with one outer contour and possibly some holes.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.NormalizeSplitInternal(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Normalizes the region with Normalize() function and splits each separate contour to a separate region that are put in the list returned. Assumes the polys in the region are simple and closed.
member.param: If true polys are not copied
member.returns: A list of normalized and split regions

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Split(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Similar to NormalizeSplit but region is assumed to be normalized already. Splits the region in CCW+CW... regions
member.param: If polys are added raw or copied
member.returns: A list of split regions with one CCW and multiple CW polys

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.ArcFit(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this region for which each poly is ArcFit():ed. See ArcFit() function in Poly2d() for details.
member.param: The tolerance to fit arcs with.
member.returns: A new region which is an arc fitted version of this one.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Flatten(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.FlattenMode)
member.summary: Approximates this region into another region where each contour contains line segments only.
member.param: The tolerance to flatten arcs with.
The mode to use when flattening arc segments. See FlattenMode enumeration for details.
member.returns: A new region which is the flattened version of this.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Clean(System.Double)
member.summary: Calls the Clean() function for each poly in this region, which will remove short segments etc. in-place.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Clear
member.summary: Removes all contours from this region in-place, making this an empty region.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Union
member.summary: Computes a self-union of this region into a new region. Direction of contours matters, Counter clockwise are outer and clockwise are holes. This function is good for trimming offsets of closed region contours.
member.returns: A new region.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.ClosestNode(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Double@)
member.summary: Computes the index of the node and contour that is closest to a given point. If the region is empty, an exception will be thrown. This function also givest the actual distance between point and node.
member.param: The point to be as close as possible to.
Set to the index of the contour closest to the point.
Set to the index of the node closest to the point.
Set to the distance from the point to the closest node.

member.summary: Computes the index of the node and contour that is closest to a given point. If the region is empty, an exception will be thrown.

Set to the index of the contour closest to the point.
Set to the index of the node closest to the point.

member.param: The point to be as close as possible to.
Set to the index of the contour closest to the point.
Set to the index of the segment closest to the point.
Set to the distance from the point to the closest node.

member.summary: Computes the index of the segment and contour that is closest to a given point. If the region is empty, an exception will be thrown.

Set to the index of the segment closest to the point.

member.summary: Computes a point somewhere on the regions contours that is as close as possible to a given point.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Region2d.Swell(System.Double)
member.summary: Shortcut to Stroke(...) the region with Round linecaps and round endcaps, that is the 'real' offset of the segments (all points of the result has the given distance to the original line). The result is _not_ trimmed. See Union() function for this. If the region is closed, an exception will be thrown.
member.param: The swell distance. Total with of each contour is this value times two.
member.returns: A new, untrimmed and swelled version of this region.

member.name: T:IGS.Genamo.Skyline
member.summary: Implements a skyline algorithm for computing the upper envelope of a set of line segments. The skyline represents the visible outline when viewing from above at a specified angle. Uses floating-point precision for calculations.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Skyline.ang
member.summary: The rotation angle in radians used to transform input geometry before processing. This allows skyline computation from different viewing angles.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Skyline.lines
member.summary: Collection of line segments that will be processed to compute the skyline. Lines are rotated by the specified angle before being added to this collection.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Skyline.box
member.summary: Bounding box that encompasses all input line segments after rotation. Used to establish the baseline for skyline computation.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Skyline.#ctor(System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Skyline class with the specified rotation angle.
member.param: The rotation angle in radians for transforming input geometry.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Skyline.Add(IGS.Genamo.Poly2d)
member.summary: Adds all line segments from a polygon to the skyline computation. Each arc in the polygon is converted to a straight line segment.
member.param: The polygon whose segments will be added to the skyline.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Skyline.Add(IGS.Genamo.Line2d)
member.summary: Adds a single line segment to the skyline computation after applying rotation and validation. Filters out degenerate lines (zero length, vertical lines, or backwards lines).
member.param: The line segment to add. Will be rotated by the specified angle.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Skyline.Compute
member.summary: Computes the skyline by processing all added line segments. Creates an upper envelope representing the visible outline from the specified viewing angle.
member.returns: A polygon representing the computed skyline, rotated back to original orientation.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Skyline.InsertEdge(IGS.Genamo.Line2d,IGS.Genamo.LinkList{IGS.Genamo.Line2d})
member.summary: Inserts a line segment into the current skyline by determining intersections and visibility. This is the core algorithm that maintains the upper envelope property.
member.param: The line segment to insert into the skyline.
The current skyline represented as a linked list of line segments.

member.name: T:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt
member.summary: Integer-precision implementation of the skyline algorithm for improved performance and numerical stability. Uses integer coordinates and fixed-point arithmetic to avoid floating-point precision issues. Particularly useful when working with large coordinate values or when exact results are required.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.ang
member.summary: The rotation angle in radians used to transform input geometry before processing.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.cs
member.summary: Cosine of the rotation angle, precomputed for efficiency.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.si
member.summary: Sine of the rotation angle, precomputed for efficiency.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.csb
member.summary: Cosine of the negative rotation angle, used for back-rotation.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.sib
member.summary: Sine of the negative rotation angle, used for back-rotation.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.left
member.summary: Leftmost X-coordinate of all input geometry after rotation.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.right
member.summary: Rightmost X-coordinate of all input geometry after rotation.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.bot
member.summary: Bottommost Y-coordinate of all input geometry after rotation. Used to establish the baseline for skyline computation.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.lines
member.summary: Collection of line segments represented as pairs of integer points. All segments are oriented from left to right after rotation.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.#ctor(System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the SkylineInt class with the specified rotation angle. Precomputes trigonometric values for efficient coordinate transformation.
member.param: The rotation angle in radians for transforming input geometry.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.Rotate(Clipper.IntPoint@)
member.summary: Rotates an integer point by the specified angle using precomputed trigonometric values. Modifies the point in-place.
member.param: The point to rotate. Modified in-place.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.RotateBack(Clipper.IntPoint@)
member.summary: Rotates an integer point back to its original orientation (inverse rotation). Used to transform results back to the original coordinate system.
member.param: The point to rotate back. Modified in-place.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.Round(System.Double)
member.summary: Rounds a floating-point value to the nearest integer using standard rounding rules. Handles both positive and negative values correctly.
member.returns: The rounded integer value as a long.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.Add(Clipper.IntPoint,Clipper.IntPoint)
member.summary: Adds a line segment defined by two integer points to the skyline computation. The line is rotated and oriented from left to right before storage.
member.param: The first endpoint of the line segment.
The second endpoint of the line segment.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.Compute
member.summary: Computes the skyline from all added line segments and returns the result as a list of points. The points form a connected path representing the upper envelope of the input geometry.
member.returns: A list of integer points representing the skyline path, rotated back to original orientation.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.GetY(Clipper.IntPoint,Clipper.IntPoint,System.Int64)
member.summary: Calculates the Y-coordinate on a line segment at a given X-coordinate using integer arithmetic. Uses linear interpolation between the two endpoints of the line segment.
member.param: The first endpoint of the line segment.
The second endpoint of the line segment.
The X-coordinate at which to calculate the Y-coordinate.
member.returns: The interpolated Y-coordinate as a long integer.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.InsertEdge(Clipper.IntPoint,Clipper.IntPoint,IGS.Genamo.LinkList{IGS.Genamo.Pair{Clipper.IntPoint,Clipper.IntPoint}})
member.summary: Inserts a line segment into the current integer skyline by determining intersections and visibility. This is the core algorithm that maintains the upper envelope property using integer arithmetic.
member.param: The starting point of the line segment to insert.
The ending point of the line segment to insert.
The current skyline represented as a linked list of line segments.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SkylineInt.Intersect(Clipper.IntPoint,Clipper.IntPoint,Clipper.IntPoint,Clipper.IntPoint,Clipper.IntPoint@)
member.summary: Determines whether two line segments, defined by their endpoints, intersect and calculates the intersection point if they do. Uses integer arithmetic and parametric line equations to compute intersections precisely.
member.param: The first point of the first line segment.
The second point of the first line segment.
The first point of the second line segment.
The second point of the second line segment.
The intersection point if the line segments intersect. Output parameter.
member.returns: Returns true if the line segments intersect; otherwise, false.
member.remarks: This method checks if two line segments, defined by their endpoints, intersect by calculating intersection parameters (s and t) and ensures that the intersection lies on both segments. If they intersect, the intersection point is calculated and returned through the parameter. If the segments are parallel or do not intersect, the method returns false. The algorithm uses the parametric form of lines and solves the system of equations to find intersection parameters.

member.summary: Static (packed) R-Tree using Hilbert-curve ordering for fast AABB queries.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SpatialIndex2d.VisitBoundingBoxes(IGS.Genamo.SpatialLevelCallback)
member.summary: Visit all the bounding boxes in the spatial index. Visitor function has the signature bool(int level, double xmin, double ymin, double xmax, double ymax). Visiting stops early if false is returned from the callback, in which turn this function returns false.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.SpatialIndex2d.VisitQuery(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Func{System.Int32,System.Boolean},System.Collections.Generic.Stack{System.Int32})
member.summary: Query the spatial index, invoking a visitor function for each index that overlaps the bounding box given. Visitor function has the signature bool(std::size_t index), if visitor returns false the query stops early, otherwise the query continues. This overload accepts an existing vector to use as a stack and takes care of clearing the stack before use.

member.name: T:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d
member.summary: Class that represents a 2d vector, that is a length and a direction in 2d space.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.x
member.summary: The x component of the vector left public for fast access.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.y
member.summary: The y component of the vector left public for fast access.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a zero length vector

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.#ctor(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Copy constructor.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.ToPoint
member.summary: Create a point (x,y) from the vector components (x,y).

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a vector with x and y as data.
member.param: The x component for the vector.
The y component for the vector.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.#ctor(IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Creates a vector taking x,y from the point

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.#ctor(IGS.Genamo.Point2d,IGS.Genamo.Point2d)
member.summary: Creates a vector that represents the translation from a point to another.
member.param: The source point of the translation.
The target point of the translation.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.Equals(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d,System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if this vector is about the same as another with a given tolerance.
member.param: The maximum distance between vector ends.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.DirectionalWith(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d,System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if the vector has the same direction as another with a given tolerance.
member.param: The maximum distance between x,y of the two vectors normalized.
member.returns: True if this vector is about the same as the one compared with.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.ParallelWith(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d,System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if the vector is parallel with another with a given tolerance.
member.param: The maximum distance between the normalized versions of the vectors.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.Normalize
member.summary: Normalizes the vector in-place, which means making its length 1.0 maintaining its angle. If the vectors length is 0.0 an exception is thrown.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.Length
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the vector.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.SquaredLength
member.summary: Gets the The squared length of the vector. This is faster than than getting it's actual length.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.DotProduct(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Computes the dot product between this vector and another. If the vectors are normalized this is the same as cosine of the smallest angle between vectors.
member.returns: A dot product.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.PerpendicularDotProduct(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Computes the dot product of the vector perpendicular with this one and another. If the vectors are normalized this is the same as sine of the smallest angle between vectors.
member.returns: The perpendicular dot product of the vectors.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.Angle
member.summary: Gets the angle of the vector.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.LeftNormal
member.summary: Gets the normal on the left side of this vector as a new vector that has the same length as this one. This means: Vector2d(1,0).LeftNormal equals Vector2d(0,1)

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.RightNormal
member.summary: Gets the normal on the right side of this vector as a new vector that has the same length as this one. This means: Vector2d(1,0).LeftNormal equals Vector2d(0,-1)

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.SmallestAngle(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Returns the angle between this vector and another. Tha angle returned is always the one less then PI.
member.returns: A double representing the angle.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.DifferentialAngle(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Computes the angular difference from this vector to another in the range -PI to +PI.
member.returns: A value between -PI to +PI Zero if the vectors have the same angle. Positive if v turns to left from this. Negative if v turns to right from this.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.AngleCCW(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Computes the counter clockwise angle from this vector to another.
member.returns: An angle in radians.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.AngleCW(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Computes the clockwise angle from this vector to another.
member.returns: An angle in radians.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.op_Addition(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d,IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Creates a new vector that is a sum of two others.
member.returns: A sum of the two vectors given.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.op_Subtraction(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d,IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Subtracts a vector from another into a new vector.
member.returns: A new vector.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.op_UnaryNegation(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Computes the negation of a vector into a new vector.
member.returns: The negated version of the vector given as a new vector.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.op_Multiply(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d,System.Double)
member.summary: Multiplies the length of the vector with a factor (scales it)
member.returns: A new vector which has the same angle as the one sent but length multiplied with the factor.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.op_Multiply(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Vector2d)
member.summary: Multiplies the length of the vector with a factor (scales it)
member.returns: A new vector which has the same angle as the one sent but length multiplied with the factor.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.op_Division(IGS.Genamo.Vector2d,System.Double)
member.summary: Divides the length of the vector with a factor (scales it)
member.returns: A new vector which has the same angle as the one sent but length divided with the factor.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.CreateFromAngle(System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a unit vector with a given angle.
member.param: The angle the vector should have in radians.
member.returns: A new unit vector with the given angle.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.CreateFromAngleAndLength(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a vector with a given angle and length.
member.param: The angle of the vector in radians.
member.returns: A new vector with the specified angle anf length.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.Transform(IGS.Genamo.Matrix2d)
member.summary: Transforms the vector in-place with a matrix. When transforming a vector, the translation portion of the matrix is ignored, just scaling and rotation is considered.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector2d.ToString
member.summary: Creates a string representation of the vector suitable for debugging.
member.returns: A string with vector data.

member.name: T:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d
member.summary: A class that represents a vector in 3d space.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.x
member.summary: The x component of the vector left public for fast access.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.y
member.summary: The y component of the vector left public for fast access.

member.name: F:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.z
member.summary: The z component of the vector left public for fast access.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a vector of zero length.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.#ctor(IGS.Genamo.Vector3d)
member.summary: Copy constructor.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Creates a vector with specified x,y,z components.
member.param: The x component for the vector.
The y component for the vector.
The z component for the vector.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.Normalize
member.summary: Modifies the vector in-place to have unit length.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.Length
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the vector.
member.returns: The length of the vector.

member.name: P:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.SquaredLength
member.summary: Computes the squared length of the vector, which is faster than computing its length.
member.returns: The vectors squared length.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.Dot(IGS.Genamo.Vector3d)
member.summary: Computes the dot product between this vector and another. If the vectors are normalized this is the same as cosine of the smallest angle between vectors.
member.returns: A dot product.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.op_Multiply(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Vector3d)
member.summary: Multiplies the length of the vector with a factor (scales it)
member.returns: A new vector which has the same direction as the one sent but length multiplied with the factor.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.op_Multiply(IGS.Genamo.Vector3d,System.Double)
member.summary: Multiplies the length of the vector with a factor (scales it)
member.returns: A new vector which has the same direction as the one sent but length multiplied with the factor.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.ToString
member.summary: Creates a string representation of the vector suitable for debugging.
member.returns: A string with vector data.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.Angle(IGS.Genamo.Vector3d)
member.summary: Computes the inner angle between this vector and another

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.DiffrentialAngle(IGS.Genamo.Vector3d,IGS.Genamo.Vector3d)
member.summary: Returns the signed angle in range (-PI,PI) from this vector to vector v, in the plane that has 'normal' as normal. The normal is needed because we dont know which side of the plane defined by the vectors that is frontside. 'normal' does not need to be normalized.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.RotateZ(System.Double)
member.summary: Rotates this vector in-place around the z axis.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.RotateX(System.Double)
member.summary: Rotates this vector in-place around x axis

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.RotateY(System.Double)
member.summary: Rotates this vector in-place around y axis

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.GetRotated(System.Double,IGS.Genamo.Vector3d,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a copy of this vector rotated with `angle` radians over `axis`.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.Vector3d.Bisector(IGS.Genamo.Vector3d)
member.summary: Computes the vector that is the bisector of this and another vector. The length of the result is undefined. If any of the two input vectors has zero length, the result is the other input vector.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.CellJoin.Add(IGS.Genamo.Line2d)
member.summary: Adds geometry to join.

member.name: M:IGS.Genamo.CellJoin.Compute
member.summary: Joins the geometry added with the Add functions.
member.returns: A new Region2d with the joined geometry.

member.name: T:DelaunayTriangulator.HullVertex
member.summary: Vertices belonging to the convex hull need to maintain a point and triad index

member.name: T:DelaunayTriangulator.Hull
member.summary: Hull represents a list of vertices in the convex hull, and keeps track of their indices (into the associated points list) and triads

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Hull.VectorToNext(System.Int32,System.Single@,System.Single@)
member.summary: Return vector from the hull point at index to next point

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Hull.EdgeVisibleFrom(System.Int32,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Return whether the hull vertex at index is visible from the supplied coordinates

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Hull.EdgeVisibleFrom(System.Int32,DelaunayTriangulator.Vertex)
member.summary: Return whether the hull vertex at index is visible from the point

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triad.FindCircumcirclePrecisely(System.Collections.Generic.List{DelaunayTriangulator.Vertex})
member.summary: Find location and radius ^2 of the circumcircle (through all 3 points) This is the most critical routine in the entire set of code. It must be numerically stable when the points are nearly collinear.

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triad.InsideCircumcircle(DelaunayTriangulator.Vertex)
member.summary: Return true iff Vertex p is inside the circumcircle of this triangle

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triad.ChangeAdjacentIndex(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Change any adjacent triangle index that matches fromIndex, to toIndex

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triad.FindAdjacency(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Determine which edge matches the triangleIndex, then which vertex the vertexIndex Set the indices of the opposite vertex, left and right edges accordingly

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triangulator.ConvexHull(System.Collections.Generic.List{DelaunayTriangulator.Vertex})
member.summary: Return the convex hull of the supplied points, Don't check for duplicate points

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triangulator.ConvexHull(System.Collections.Generic.List{DelaunayTriangulator.Vertex},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Return the convex hull of the supplied points, Optionally check for duplicate points

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triangulator.Triangulation(System.Collections.Generic.List{IGS.Genamo.Point2d})
member.summary: Return the Delaunay triangulation of the supplied points Don't check for duplicate points
member.returns: Triads specifying the triangulation

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triangulator.Triangulation(System.Collections.Generic.List{DelaunayTriangulator.Vertex},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Return the Delaunay triangulation of the supplied points Optionally check for duplicate points

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triangulator.FlipTriangle(System.Collections.Generic.List{DelaunayTriangulator.Triad},System.Int32,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Test the triad against its 3 neighbours and flip it with any neighbour whose opposite point is inside the circumcircle of the triad
member.param: The index of the triad to test
Index of adjacent triangle it was flipped with (if any)
member.returns: true iff the triad was flipped with any of its neighbours

member.name: M:DelaunayTriangulator.Triangulator.FlipTriangles(System.Collections.Generic.List{DelaunayTriangulator.Triad},System.Boolean[])
member.summary: Flip triangles that do not satisfy the Delaunay condition
